final_determination: MONTGOMERY RUNTIME DATA SOURCE INTEGRATION COMPLETE WITH OBSERVATIONS
observations: Montgomery boundary and awareness sources are county-owned and active.
Montgomery road segment geometry is not present in the package; runtime resolver fails safe to Conroe, Montgomery County, selected awareness area, or neutral wording.
Montgomery rail crossing source is not present in the package; crossing source state is neutral/pending and cannot reuse Liberty crossing counts.
Legacy untagged event rows are excluded from Montgomery active incident generation while remaining Liberty-compatible.
